admin_avgRoundsTitle: Average Rounds (Rds expected per match to X points)
admin_breaksDesc: Break time between matches and phases
admin_configureMatchFormat: Configure how matches are played in each phase
admin_confirmCancelTournament: Are you sure you want to cancel this tournament?
admin_consolationPending: Consolation matches are generated automatically when the corresponding round is completed.
admin_consolationRoundsDescription: Allows players eliminated in the first round to continue playing in a secondary bracket.
admin_couldNotLoadGroupStage: Could not load group stage data
admin_deleteMatchWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this match?
admin_disableUserDescription: The user will not be able to sign in. Their data and matches remain intact. You can reactivate them at any time.
admin_earlyRoundsHint: Rounds before Semifinals (e.g. Round of 16, Quarterfinals)
admin_groupStageScheduleWillBeGenerated: Group stage schedule will be generated.
admin_matchDurationDesc: Average time per match in minutes
admin_maxTournamentsPerYearHint: Contact an admin to increase your tournament limit.
admin_noShowConfirmMessage: {name} did not show up for the match. The opponent will automatically win by walkover.
admin_noShowConfirmConsolation: This tournament has consolation enabled: the absent player will move to the consolation bracket, where they can continue playing.
admin_parallelFinalsDesc: Play final and third place at the same time
admin_parallelSemifinalsDesc: Play both semifinals at the same time
admin_selectQualifiersAfter: You will select qualifiers in the next step.
admin_timeConfigDesc: Configure estimated times for the tournament
admin_timeConfigInfo: These times are approximate and are only used to calculate the estimated duration of the tournament.
admin_tournamentWillAdvanceDirectly: Tournament will advance directly to Bracket stage.
admin_tournamentWillBeCancelled: The tournament will be permanently cancelled.
admin_useCreateButton: Use the Create button to start
auth_loginPrivacyNote: Your data will be securely synced with your account
auth_loginWelcome: Log in to sync your matches
auth_mustBeSignedIn: You must be signed in to sync
auth_playerNameDescription: Used in matches and rankings. Must be unique. Enter first and last name
bracket_consolationEmptyNote: No consolation matches in this band: the corresponding round had a single real loser, so they take position {position} automatically.
bracket_consolationNotGenerated: Could not generate brackets - verify that the round (quarters or eighths) is complete
common_storageBlockedMessage: Your browser is blocking cookies or site data. The app still works, but your games and settings won't be saved on this device. Allow cookies in your browser settings to keep your progress.
notifications_denied: Notifications are blocked in this browser. To enable them, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
scoring_resetMatchDesc: All points and rounds will be reset.
sync_confirmTeamForEachMatch: Confirm your team for each match
sync_selectTeamBeforeSyncing: Select which team you played on before syncing to your account
timeout_annotateRound: Record the result of this last round once you finish
timeout_description: Time is up. Finish the current round (throw any discs you have left). Once you're done, count the 20s and mark who won this round.
tournament_abandonMatchDesc: Progress will be lost and others can play it
tournament_buchholzTooltip: Buchholz: sum of all your opponents' points
tournament_byeMatchNotice: This is a BYE match. The player advances automatically.
tournament_externalUpdateWarning: This match was updated from another device. Your unsaved changes are kept.
tournament_exitMessage: What do you want to do with this match?
tournament_inProgressWarning: There are matches in progress. Select them to continue with caution.
tournament_keyHint: Ask the organizer for the key
tournament_miniLeagueDescription: Tiebreaker calculated only with matches between tied players
tournament_pauseMatchDesc: You can resume later with the same key
tournament_tiesNotAllowedInElimination: Draws are not allowed in knockout rounds
admin_swissRoundsMinError: The number of rounds must be greater than the current round ( {n} )
tournament_forceFinishTooltip: End the match with the current score (whoever has the most points wins)
tournament_matchCompletedByAdminDesc: The organizer has ended this match due to time limits. The result has been saved.
admin_noMatchesFilter: There are no matches that match the filters
admin_noMatchesYet: There are no registered matches yet
rules_consolationExplanation: Players eliminated in the early rounds of the main draw continue to compete in secondary brackets to determine their final ranking. No one goes home after losing a single match in the final stage.
rules_goldSilverBrackets: It is divided into two brackets: **Gold** (qualified participants) and **Silver** (remaining participants), each with its own elimination round.
rules_goldSilverWithConsolation: It is divided into two brackets: **Gold** (qualified players) and **Silver** (remaining participants), both with consolation rounds to determine all positions
rules_multipleGroups: The participants are divided into {n} groups
rules_onePhaseIntro: The tournament is single elimination: all participants enter directly into an elimination bracket.
rules_qualifiersAdvance: The top-ranked teams from the group stage advance to the final stage
rules_rankingPoints: This tournament counts towards the **ranking** with category ** {tier} **. The winner receives ** {maxPoints} points** and the rest according to their final position as can be seen below.
rules_rankingNotEnabled: This tournament is friendly and does not award ranking points.
rules_singleBracketElimination: It is played in a single-elimination bracket. Whoever loses is eliminated.
rules_singleBracketWithConsolation: It is played in a single elimination bracket, but with consolation rounds that allow all final positions to be determined.
rules_singleGroup: All participants play in a single group
rules_swissRounds: {n} rounds with dynamic pairings are played
rules_tablesExplanation: The tournament has ** {n} playing tables**, allowing up to {n} matches to be played in parallel.
rules_twoPhaseIntro: The tournament consists of two phases: first a group stage and then a final knockout stage.
tournament_errorMatchCompleted: The match has already been completed
tournament_errorMatchInProgress: The game is already in progress on another device.
rules_tablesAllPlaySingles: With ** {players} players** and ** {tables} tables**, everyone can play at the same time ( {matches} matches per round.
rules_tablesAllPlayDoubles: With ** {players} pairs** and ** {tables} tables**, all can play at the same time ( {matches} matches per round.
rules_tablesSomeWaitSingles: With ** {players} players** and ** {tables} tables**, ** {matches} matches are played per round**. Some players wait between rounds.
rules_tablesSomeWaitDoubles: With ** {players} pairs** and ** {tables} tables**, ** {matches} matches are played per round**. Some pairs wait between rounds.
rules_tablesOddByeDoubles: Since there is an odd number, in each round **1 pair rests** (BYE) and receives an automatic win of **8-0** with **0 twenties**.
rules_tablesOddByeDoublesWins: Since there is an odd number, in each round **1 pair rests** (BYE) and receives an **automatic win** (2 points).
rules_tablesOddByeSingles: Since it is an odd number, in each round **1 player rests** (BYE) and receives an automatic win of **8-0** with **0 twenties**.
rules_tablesOddByeSinglesWins: Since it is an odd number, in each round **1 player rests** (BYE) and receives an **automatic win** (2 points).
rules_roundRobinMultiGroup: The participants are divided into ** {n} groups** where **everyone plays against everyone**
rules_roundRobinSingleGroup: **Everyone plays against everyone** in a single group
rules_swissExplanation: **Swiss System** in ** {n} rounds**: each round pairs players with similar scores
rules_groupClassificationByWins: Ranking: **2 pts** for a win, **1 pt** for a draw, **0 pts** for a loss
rules_groupTiebreakBuchholzNote: **Buchholz** = sum of all opponents' points (measures schedule strength)
rules_groupTiebreakByPoints: In case of a tie: first **total of 20s**, then **head-to-head**
rules_groupTiebreakByWins: In case of a tie: first **head-to-head**, then **total of 20s**
rules_groupTiebreakShootout: If tie persists: **Shoot-out** (12 shots at the 20)
rules_groupTiesAllowed: In round-robin matches, **ties may occur** (points tied at the end).
rules_roundsModeTiebreakNote: In rounds mode, if there is a tie at the end, **extra rounds** are played until one player wins by **2 points**.
rules_legendPg: Pg = First to win (e.g., Pg2 = first to win 2 games)
wizard_classificationWinsHint: Win = 2 pts, Draw = 1 pt, Loss = 0 pts
wizard_consolationDesc: Extra matches for positions 5th-16th in each bracket
wizard_keyHint: Players will use this code to join the tournament
wizard_pointsNote: Points follow the official NCA curve. All participants receive at least 1 point.
wizard_seriesDescription: Ranking points depend on the category:
wizard_rankingHelp: It allows you to keep a player ranking based on tournament performance
wizard_pointsNoteDynamic: Winner points are reduced proportionally and the distribution is interpolated so last place receives 1 point.
wizard_pointsNoteOfficial: With enough participants, the official table is used. The winner receives the series' maximum points.
wizard_someRest: Some will rest ( {max} play at the same time)
wizard_errorKeyFormat: The key must be exactly 6 alphanumeric characters (AZ, 0-9)
wizard_errorKeyInUse: The key " {key} " is already in use by another tournament
wizard_errorEditionRange: The edition must be a number between 1 and 1000.
wizard_errorMinTables: There must be at least 1 table
wizard_errorMinGroups: There must be at least 1 group
wizard_errorSwissMinRounds: The Swiss system requires at least 3 rounds
wizard_errorSelectTier: You must select a tournament category
wizard_warningDoublesEven: For doubles, an even number of participants is recommended.
rules_thirdPlaceMatch: The losers of the semi-finals play the 3rd and 4th place match.
rules_thirdPlaceMatchSplitDivisions: In each bracket (Gold and Silver), the losers of the semi-finals play the 3rd and 4th place match.
rules_noThirdPlaceMatch: There is no third-place match. The losers of the semi-finals are tied for 3rd-4th place.
wizard_thirdPlaceMatchDesc: The losers of the semi-finals play for 3rd and 4th place
admin_targetHasData: The target user already has tournaments or rankings
import_batchHint: One name per line or separated by commas
admin_canImportTournamentsHint: Allows importing historical tournaments (does not count towards quota)
wizard_liveHostDescription: This wizard guides you through creating a LIVE tournament as the organizer. Configure all phases (groups, knockouts), game formats, and rounds. Players can enter their results in real time from their devices.
import_description: This form allows you to register tournaments that were not managed live with the app. Enter the participants and results of the final stage (minimum). It is not necessary to include all the details such as individual rounds or 20s.
import_hasGroupStage: This tournament has a group stage
import_minParticipantsGroup: The group {n} needs at least 2 participants
import_minRoundsBracket: The bracket {label} needs at least one round
import_noMatches: There are no matches in this round
import_noPermissionDesc: You do not have permission to import historical tournaments.
import_noPermissionError: You do not have permission to import tournaments
import_noPermissionHint: Contact a SuperAdmin to obtain this permission.
import_participantExists: There is already a participant with this name.
import_userAlreadyAdded: This user has already been added
import_batchHintDoubles: One team name per line (e.g., The Flickers, Team Barcelona)
import_addRowHint: Click on '+ Add row' to begin
tournament_upcomingDescription: This tournament is confirmed and awaiting play.
wizard_upcomingHint: Do you just want to announce the tournament? You can complete the setup later.
wizard_saveAsUpcomingSuccess: Tournament saved. You can complete the setup later.
tournament_resultsComingSoon: The results will be available soon.
admin_transferDescription: {name} will be the new owner of the tournament.
common_translateSameLanguage: The text is already in your language.
tournament_isTestHint: Test tournaments do not appear in the public listing
admin_consolationNotNeeded: With 5 or fewer teams qualified, the consolation phase is not necessary since the main draw determines all positions.
admin_noBrokenMatches: There are no matches to fix.
privacy_whatWeCollectIntro: When you sign in with Google or email, we collect:
privacy_dataName: Name and surname (from your account or one you choose)
privacy_dataPhoto: Profile photo (optional, you can upload a custom one)
privacy_useProfile: Identify you in games and tournaments
privacy_thirdPartyText: We use Firebase (Google) for authentication, data storage, and hosting. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy_dataStorageText: Your data is stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) servers within the European Union. The app also works offline by storing data locally on your device.
privacy_dataDeletionText: You can request complete deletion of your account and all your data by sending an email to scorekinole@gmail.com. We will process your request within 30 days.
privacy_contactText: For any privacy-related questions, write to us at scorekinole@gmail.com.
deletion_intro: At Scorekinole we respect your privacy. You can request the complete deletion of your account and all associated data.
deletion_howToStep1: Send an email to scorekinole@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account.
deletion_howToStep2: Use the subject line: "Data deletion request".
deletion_howToStep3: We will process your request within 30 days and confirm by email.
deletion_localDataText: The app also stores data on your device (localStorage). To delete it, clear the app data from your browser settings or uninstall the app.
admin_cannotDeleteHasOwnership: It cannot be deleted: transfer ownership first
admin_collaboratorWillBeRemoved: You will be automatically removed as a contributor.
admin_disqualifyConfirm: Are you sure you want to disqualify {name} ?
admin_disqualifyWarning: The participant will not appear in the final ranking and will not receive ranking points.
import_groupStageFormat: Format: Group name on one line, followed by participants as Name,Points,20s
import_pasteGroupDataHint: Paste the results from the group stage. Each group begins with its name, followed by the participants in the format: Name,Points,20s (one participant per line). Groups are separated by a blank line.
import_skipGroupStageHint: If the tournament does not have a group stage, click here.
import_noGroupStageMode: Tournament without group stage — only final stage
import_mustParseFirst: You should analyze the data before continuing.
import_pasteKnockoutDataHint: Format: [Bracket Name] on one line, then phase name (Semifinals, Final...), and matches as Player1,Player2,PointsA,PointsB
import_noBracketsFound: No brackets were found in the text
import_unknownParticipant: " {name} " is not in the list of participants
import_unknownParticipantsHint: These names do not match the participants in Step 2. Correct the names or go back to add them.
import_hasUnknownParticipants: There are {count} participant(s) in the results that are not listed in Step 2. Correct the names before continuing.
wizard_bulkEntryTitle: or add in batch (registered and unregistered)
wizard_bulkHelpDoubles: One couple per line (stage name optional):
wizard_bulkErrorIsRegistered: He's already registered. Add him from the user search.
stats_loginRequired: Log in to view your statistics
stats_noMatchesYet: You don't have any registered matches yet
wizard_bulkErrorsFound: There are errors in the list of participants
join_alreadyAccepted: You have already accepted this invitation
join_alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used
join_cannotJoinOwnInvite: You cannot join your own invitation
join_successDesc: You will play as {role} in this {gameType} game. The result will be saved to your history.
invite_descSinglesOpponent: Your opponent must scan this QR code to join the game. Their stats will also be saved.
invite_descDoublesMyPartner: Your teammate must scan this QR code to join the game.
invite_descDoublesOpponent: The main player of the opposing team must scan this QR code to join.
invite_descDoublesOpponentPartner: The opposing teammate must scan this QR code to join.
invite_assignHintMessage: Tap + to record this match on your profile
invite_inviteHintMessage: Does your opponent have an account? Invite them so their stats are saved too
scan_instruction: Point the camera at the QR code
auth_playerNameTaken: This player name is already in use. Please choose another.
import_roundDetailsHint: Optional: Add round lines after each game (points_A, points_B, twenty_A, twenty_B)
common_errorPageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
auth_playerNameRequired: Enter first and last name (e.g., Juan García)
tournament_inProgressHint: Select a match to resume it
tournament_inProgressUserInfo: Your opponent is already managing this match. Only enter if there is a problem with their device.
tournament_inProgressUserInfoDoubles: Someone from the other team is already managing this game. Only join if there's a problem with your device.
tournament_noPendingMatchesUserHint: Wait for the organizer to schedule your next match or check back later
analytics_noData: There is no data for the selected period.
auth_alreadyHaveAccount: Do you already have an account?
auth_emailAlreadyInUse: This email address is already registered. Try logging in.
auth_gmailUseGoogleSignIn: For Gmail accounts, use the 'Continue with Google' button.
common_profileSaveError: Could not save your profile. Check your connection and try again.
auth_passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth_resetEmailSentDescription: If an account exists with that email address, you will receive a link to reset your password.
auth_resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth_verifyEmailBanner: Your email has not yet been verified.
auth_verifyEmailSent: We've sent a verification email to {email} . Check your inbox (and spam) and click the link to verify your account.
bracket_cannotChangeWinner: The winner of a completed match cannot be changed. The result has already been displayed in the bracket.
tournament_scoringByConfirm: {name} is controlling this match. Do you want to take control?
admin_finalizeTournamentConfirm: The tournament will be completed with the current group stage standings.
admin_finalizeTournamentDesc: Check the final standings and complete the tournament.
admin_errorFinalizingTournament: Error at the end of the tournament
admin_groupOnlyDescription: No final stage. Qualification is determined by the group stage.
admin_unresolvedTiesWarning: There are unresolved ties. Check the standings before finalizing.
auth_passwordRequirements: The password does not meet the security requirements.
admin_exportLevel2Desc: Total scores and 20s for each game
admin_exportLevel3Desc: Points and 20s for each individual round
admin_venueDeleteBlocked: It cannot be removed: there are linked tournaments
join_inviteCancelled: The invitation has been cancelled by the host
wizard_whoStartsPickupHint: The player chooses who shoots first in each game.
wizard_whoStartsAlternateHint: It is assigned automatically by alternating between matches.
profile_noTournaments: This player has not yet participated in tournaments
wizard_minQualifiersHint: Players who move up to the Gold League will compete for the top spots. The rest will go to the Silver League.
registration_onWaitlist: You are on the waiting list
registration_contactAdmin: Contact the administrator to register as a guest
registration_confirmUnregister: Are you sure you want to unregister?
registration_confirmLeaveWaitlist: Do you want to leave the waitlist?
registration_promoteSuccess: Player promoted to the registered list
registration_partnerAdminNote: The administrator will assign you a partner later
registration_maxParticipantsHintDoubles: In doubles, the limit counts pairs (not individual players)
registration_maxParticipantsHintSingles: Maximum number of participants that can register
auth_networkError: Connection error. Check your internet connection and try again.
auth_popupClosed: The window closed before the login was completed. Please try again.
auth_accountExistsDifferentProvider: This account already exists with another login method. Try Google or another method.
admin_cannotDisableHasOwnership: It cannot be disabled: transfer ownership of tournaments and venues first.
auth_userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact the administrator.
registration_deadlineErrorAfterTournamen: The deadline must be before the day of the tournament.
rules_qualifiersAdvanceCount: The ** {count} highest ranked teams** from the group stage advance to the final stage.
rules_qualifiersSplitDivisionsCount: The ** {count} highest ranked** move to the Gold division and the rest to the Silver division.
admin_disableUserError: The user could not be disabled. Check the browser console for more details.
admin_deleteForeverHint: This user has no history: you can completely remove them from the database.
admin_deleteForeverConfirm: Permanently delete {name} ? This action is irreversible.
admin_deleteForeverError: The user could not be deleted.
bracket_winnerChangedAndRepropagated: Winner updated. The new participant now appears in the next phase.
bracket_winnerChangeInfo: You will change the winner of the match. When you save, the bracket will be updated with the new winner.
bracket_downstreamAlreadyPlayed: The winner cannot be changed: the next match (or the consolation match) has already been played. First, the result must be reversed.
bracket_revertMatchTooltip: Re-post the match and remove the winner from the next bracket. Only allowed if the next match has not yet been played.
bracket_revertConfirmDesc: The match will be marked as PENDING again and the results will be deleted. The next bracket will lose this player. This action can be reversed by playing the match again.
bracket_revertSuccess: The result has been reversed. The match is pending again.
bracket_revertBlockedDownstream: It can't be reversed: the next match has already been played. First, reverse the next one.
registration_guestPartnerNameTaken: There is already a couple invited with that name. Please add a surname or initial to differentiate them.
registration_emailNotVerified: Verify your email before registering for a tournament.
wizard_scoringSystemClassicDesc: Fixed points per tier, scaled according to the number of participants.
wizard_scoringSystemFsiDesc: Dynamic points based on the level of the registered players (NCA Field Strength Index).
wizard_fsiFloorLabel: Minimum guaranteed prize for the winner:
wizard_fsiFieldNote: Final points are calculated at the close of the tournament, based on the Snapshot ranking of the registered participants.
wizard_fsiMinDistributionNote: Distribution with the minimum tier. If the level of the entrants (FSI) is high, the winner and the rest can take more points.
wizard_fsiEstDistributionNote: Prize money is based on the estimated FSI of the current field. It will change if the number of entries changes; the final prize money is set at the close of the tournament.
wizard_fsiWinnerField: winner ≈ {pts} pts (raised by the field level)
wizard_fsiFloorActiveNote: The FSI is below the tier minimum ( {floor} ), so the winner receives the guaranteed minimum. With a stronger field (FSI above {floor} ), it would distribute more.
wizard_fsiEstimatedNote: Estimate using {ranked} of {total} participants with ranking (guests count as 0). The actual FSI is set at the close of the tournament.
registration_notifyRegistrationsTooltip: Sends a push notification to tournament administrators whenever someone registers or is added to the waitlist. This only applies while registration is open (draft status).
ranking_modeRankingHint: The 2 best tournaments of the year
ranking_seoIntro: Ranking of the best crokinole players from tournaments played in Spain, sorted by their results.
admin_dependenciesLoadError: The user dependencies could not be loaded. Close the dialog and try again.
admin_deleteMatchError: The match could not be deleted. Check your browser console for more details.
admin_enableUserError: Could not re-enable the user. Check the browser console for more details.
admin_venueSaveError: Could not save the venue. Check the browser console for more details.
privacy_fraudPreventionIntro: We only save data at the time of registration (not on every use) to detect duplicate or fraudulent accounts:
privacy_dataIP: Your IP address at the time of registration
privacy_dataFingerprint: An approximate fingerprint of the device/browser (language, screen resolution, time zone, and the like)
privacy_fraudPreventionStorage: This data is private: only you and the administrators can see it. It never appears on your public profile or in the rankings.
wizard_errorDoublesPartnersMissing: Doubles mode: There are participants without a partner. Complete the pairs or add more participants.
wizard_errorSinglesWithPartners: Individual mode: Some participants have a partner. Change the mode to doubles or add the participants again.
wizard_errorGameConfigIncomplete: Incomplete game setup: Review the point, round, and game values from step 2
leaderboards_d_twentiesPerGame: Average 20s per game (a game = several rounds, e.g. to 4 rounds or 7 points). Singles.
leaderboards_d_roundsWithTwentyPct: % of rounds where you score a 20.
leaderboards_d_perfectRounds: Total rounds with all 8 discs as 20s (perfect).
leaderboards_d_maxTwentiesInRound: Your record 20s in a single round.
leaderboards_d_maxTwentiesInGame: Your record 20s in a single game (several rounds, e.g. to 4 rounds).
leaderboards_d_maxTwentiesInGame4r: Your record 20s in a game to 4 rounds.
leaderboards_d_maxTwentiesInGame7p: Your record 20s in a game to 7 points.
leaderboards_d_maxTwentiesInGame9p: Your record 20s in a game to 9 points.
leaderboards_d_pctTwentiesWithHammer: Of your 20s, how many you make with the hammer.
leaderboards_d_twentiesPerHammerRound: Average 20s per round when you have the hammer.
leaderboards_d_twentiesPerNonHammerRound: Average 20s per round without the hammer.
leaderboards_d_hammerDifferential: How much better you score with the hammer (with − without).
leaderboards_d_hammerRoundWinPct: % of rounds you win when you have the hammer.
leaderboards_d_koTwentiesPerRound: Average 20s per round in knockout matches.
leaderboards_d_clutchDifferential: Whether you score more 20s in knockouts than in groups.
leaderboards_d_medalWinRate: % of matches you win in semifinals, final and 3rd-place match.
leaderboards_d_avgMargin: How many points you win by on average. E.g. 5 = win by ~5.
landing_eyebrow: Everything you need to play, run, and follow crokinole
landing_liveScoring_desc: Score any match in real time from your phone — no paper scoresheets, no spreadsheets. Just open the app and play.
landing_tournaments_desc: Browse live and completed tournaments from around the world. Filter by year, country, singles or doubles, and tier.
landing_tournaments_f2: Round robin, Swiss, and bracket formats
landing_admin_desc: Create and run tournaments from your phone. Manage groups, brackets, and live scoring — no laptop needed.
landing_admin_f2: Round robin, Swiss, and bracket formats
landing_admin_f3: Live management of groups and phases
landing_ranking_desc: See who's on top. Player rankings based on tournament results, with yearly and all-time views.
landing_ranking_f2: Best 2 tournaments or full season league
landing_mystats_desc: Your personal dashboard. Every match you play feeds into your profile, powering rich personal analytics.
landing_leaderboards_desc: Aggregate player stats across all tournaments. Compare yourself — and others — across every metric.
landing_leaderboards_f2: Win rate, matches played, and win streaks
landing_cta_desc: Open a match and start scoring — no account needed for friendly games.
contact_subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? Send us a message.
contact_sentText: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
